title: KINGGODFREYTV
about_body:
KINGGODFREYTV is the visual broadcast arm of the IIIGLOBE empire. Original programming, documentary-style content, and creative direction that refuses to follow the algorithm — it sets the agenda.

From brand-building series to culture commentary and cinematic short-form, KGTV is where the vision lives on screen.

items.name: The Blueprint
items.description: A docu-series on building brands, IP ownership, and scaling creative ecosystems from the ground up.

items.name: Visuals Department
items.description: Music videos, creative direction reels, and visual production showcasing the IIIGLOBE aesthetic.

items.name: King Godfrey Live
items.description: Uncut, unscripted, live-streamed conversations and events from the mind behind the movement.
